title: Draupnir Spear
description: its a pack which convert golden spear into Kratos's Draupnir Spear from the GOD OF WAR
body:
![Draupnir Spear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/747242dafc6b7428bdc2585d933264d3ca1b1d59.png)

This Minecraft resource pack replaces the golden spear with Kratos’ Draupnir Spear from God of War. Works in Vanilla Minecraft!

# why you'll love it


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

✅ No extra mods needed – Works in pure vanilla Minecraft!
 
 ✅ Better visuals – The mace looks more detailed and powerful.
   
   ✅ Easy to use – Just install the pack and enjoy!

</details>




**-hardik**
